subtitle.pt: Onde a narrativa encontra a precisão.

aboutText.en:
I'm Johan Mamedi, {age} years old, and a video editor with a lifelong connection to editing. I started editing as a child, around the age of seven, and I have been working professionally with YouTube channels and digital content since May 2024.

Professional editing experience: {experience}.

I work with pacing, motion design, sound design and visual polish to make each video feel more engaging and professional.

longFormDescription.en: Horizontal edits with cinematic pacing, strong hooks, and clean visual flow.
